name: order
description: Yareta Order — request preparing an archive download (DIP) from archives (AIP).

resId.description: The identifier of the resource. The default format is a Universally Unique IDentifier (UUID).

publicOrder.description: If the order is public, false otherwise.

metadataVersion.description: The metadata version of the order query.

name.description: The name of the order query.

query.description: The query of the order query.

queryType.description: The type of the order query.

status.description: The status of the order query.

statusMessage.description: The message related to the status of the order query.

disseminationPolicyId.description: The dissemination policy identifier linked to the order.

organizationalUnitDisseminationPolicyId.description: The dissemination policy identifier linked to the orgunit.

subitemsChecksum.description: The checksum of the order subitems list.

dipNumber.description: The DIP number of the order query.

aipNumber.description: The AIP number of the order query.
